prompt: 对已有 wpf-xaml-performance SKILL.md 扩充内容，边界案例：patch 还是不升级？

assertions.name: correct_version_bump_patch_or_no_bump
assertions.description: 决定 patch 或不升级（不应该选 minor 或 major）

assertions.name: no_git_add_all
assertions.description: 不使用 git add -A 或 git add .

assertions.name: correct_commit_type
assertions.description: 使用 feat 或 refactor（不使用 fix 或 chore）

assertions.name: commit_message_mentions_skill_content
assertions.description: commit 消息中提及新增检查点或内容扩充

assertions.name: coauthored_by_present
assertions.description: commit 消息包含 Co-Authored-By: Claude

assertions.name: push_to_master
assertions.description: 包含 git push origin master
